things.name: Colosseum
things.description: World's most iconic ancient amphitheatre, completed in 80 AD, holding 50,000 spectators

things.name: Vatican City & St Peter's Basilica
things.description: The world's smallest state with Michelangelo's Sistine Chapel and the grandest basilica

things.name: Trevi Fountain
things.description: Baroque masterpiece where tossing a coin guarantees a return to Rome

things.name: Roman Forum
things.description: Heart of ancient Rome with temples, arches and the Sacred Way

things.name: Pantheon
things.description: Perfectly preserved 2,000-year-old temple with the world's largest unreinforced concrete dome

things.name: Piazza Navona
things.description: Elegant Baroque oval piazza built over Domitian's stadium with Bernini's Four Rivers Fountain

things.name: Borghese Gallery
things.description: Exceptional collection of Bernini sculptures and Caravaggio paintings in a villa garden

things.name: Spanish Steps
things.description: Sweeping 18th-century staircase linking the Piazza di Spagna to the Trinita dei Monti church

things.name: Castel Sant'Angelo
things.description: Cylindrical mausoleum of Emperor Hadrian, later a papal fortress with panoramic views

things.name: Palatine Hill
things.description: Mythical founding hill of Rome with imperial palaces overlooking the Circus Maximus
